.github/workflows/gradle-build.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 16 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Add explicit dependency for lombok-mapstruct-binding to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for cross-compilation targeting Java 21.
